import requests
import json

# Todo service API
BASE_URL = "http://localhost:55025/todo"

# 4个任务定义
tasks = [
    {
        "title": "Create package structure under src/datautils",
        "description": "Initialize Python package structure: src/datautils/__init__.py, src/datautils/core.py. Set up __version__ and basic module exports.",
        "priority": "high"
    },
    {
        "title": "Add tests for datautils package",
        "description": "Create test directory structure: tests/__init__.py, tests/test_core.py. Add basic unit tests for core module functionality.",
        "priority": "high"
    },
    {
        "title": "Write pyproject.toml metadata",
        "description": "Create pyproject.toml with project metadata: name=datautils, python version requirements, build system, basic dependencies.",
        "priority": "high"
    },
    {
        "title": "Write README.md for datautils project",
        "description": "Create README.md with project description, installation instructions, usage examples, and contribution guidelines.",
        "priority": "medium"
    }
]

# Create tasks via API
created_tasks = []
for task in tasks:
    resp = requests.post(f"{BASE_URL}/tasks/create", json=task)
    created_tasks.append({
        "title": task["title"],
        "status_code": resp.status_code,
        "response": resp.text
    })

print(json.dumps(created_tasks, indent=2))
